title: The Fight Against Katakuri Begins
description: On pages 16–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Pudding, Unknown person #14, Sanji, Unknown person #15, Nami as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But don't worry! Leave the straw hats

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to brother oven and the army he's taken with him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you mean no one can go in the factory?!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Lady pudding said so! Not a soul.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess I'll listen to my little sister's request...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But what's all the ruckus at the front of the factory?!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: You've gotta take care of Mama, pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're our last ray of hope!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: leave it to me, sister Bruce!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll stop Mama with the best wedding cake she's ever seen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: D- Do you not remember me? My dear oven!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's why I'm kicking you out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sanji Dear, Were you Listening? Luffy's in trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's fighting a one-on-one with brother dogtooth... that man isn't even human! He's got a billion berry bounty!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's okay. Let's focus on the cake.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAAAGH! Steam's coming out of Lady Pudding's head!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell do you mean Mama's attacking nuts is- land?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Whaddaya mean?! We're already in big trouble!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How are we not being chased right now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is definitely some kind of trap!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's okay! We won't let anyone slip by us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: come to think of it... I hope aladine and the others made it out okay...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've finished surveying the sea floor... something crazy's going on!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you mean there isn't a single sea slug across the whole territory?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you stop working, it's all fun and hugs![1]

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can countless sea slugs just up and disappear?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: M- Maybe they were a kidnapped?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now we won't be able prevent a single bloody ship from run- ning away!

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 64 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
